name: ARCBEST CORP /DE/
business: ArcBest Corporation is a multibillion-dollar integrated logistics company that leverages technology and a full suite of solutions across multiple modes of transportation to meet our customers supply chain needs. We serve as a single end-to-end logistics partner with global reach. Our operations are conducted through our two reportable operating segments: Asset-Based, which consists of ABF Freight, and Asset-Light, which includes MoLo, Panther, and other subsidiaries.
sellsTo: Manufacturing industries (food, textiles, apparel, furniture, appliances, chemicals, petroleum products, rubber, plastics, metal, wood, glass, automotive parts, machinery)

exposures.sentence: ArcBest Corporation is a multibillion-dollar integrated logistics company that leverages technology and a full suite of solutions across multiple modes of transportation to meet our customers supply chain needs.
City Route Optimization uses machine learning and artificial intelligence (AI) to create algorithms using historical shipment and geographic data.

Vaux Smart Autonomy combines autonomous mobile robot forklifts and reach trucks, intelligent software, and remote teleoperation capability to autonomously handle materials movement in complex warehouse, distribution center, and manufacturing operating environments, while being monitored remotely by humans.

Vaux Smart Autonomy combines autonomous mobile robot forklifts and reach trucks, intelligent software, and remote teleoperation capability to autonomously handle materials movement in complex warehouse, distribution center, and manufacturing operating environments, while being monitored remotely by humans.
Vaux Vision, announced in February 2025, is a 3D perception technology designed to streamline material handling by providing precise, real-time freight measurements directly on a forklift.

The Clean Truck Plan takes into consideration the Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 which sought greater application of zero-emission vehicle technologies.

catalysts.event: Launch of ArcBest View and ViewPoint tool
catalysts.sentence: ArcBest View provides access to our full suite of logistics solutions and is expected to launch with the ViewPoint tool in the first half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Total market potential in the industry segments we serve is approximately $400 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to management’s estimates, and market studies by Armstrong & Associates, Inc. and the U.S. Department of Commerce during 2025, the total market potential in the industry segments we serve is approximately $400 billion.
